Notes: Sophomore center Jodie Boss scored 16 of her career-high tying 22 points in
the second half to lead Wayne State in 70-62 NSIC women's basketball win...
Boss also had 11 rebounds and five blocks...Candace Olstad had 19 points
Game.Officials: Jim Harding,  Jeff Sylliaasen,  MJ Wagenson
